title: NextGen Healthcare - Intelligent EHR with Closed Loop RCM
problem: Specialty practices need EHR tailored to their workflows with integrated RCM, patient engagement, and care coordination.
solution: Cloud EHR and PM for specialty practices. NextGen Ambient Assist for voice-to-SOAP notes. Intelligent Agent for AI-powered task orchestration. Closed Loop patient and practice experience from access to billing.
technology: Ambient listening, AI agents, voice commands, EHR/PM platform
ai_type: Ambient AI, intelligent agents, voice AI
traction_signals: Intelligent Agent for hands-free EHR interaction
varden_fit: HIGH — NextGen's Closed Loop model and AI agents show the future of practice software. European specialists need similar tools.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Specialty EHR with integrated RCM is essential infrastructure. The Intelligent Agent concept is transformative.
